schedule.title: Registration Opens
schedule.description: Kick off your CodeForge 3.0 journey! Registration is now open for all participants.

schedule.title: Registration Closes
schedule.description: Final call to join the hackathon. Don't miss your chance to be part of the challenge!

schedule.title: Shortlisting
schedule.description: Submitted team profiles and ideas will be reviewed. Shortlisted teams will move forward to the hackathon.

schedule.title: Hackathon Kickoff
schedule.description: The hackathon begins. Start building your project and turn your idea into a working solution.

schedule.title: Hackathon Ends
schedule.description: Submit your project before the deadline. Make sure everything is ready for review.

schedule.title: Results & Awards
schedule.description: Winners announced and prizes awarded in a live ceremony.

faq.question: Who is eligible to participate in CodeForge 3.0?
faq.answer: Participants from any academic or professional background with an interest in software development, design, or problem-solving are welcome. Teams should consist of 2–4 members.

faq.question: What are the team requirements for registration?
faq.answer: Teams must consist of 2–4 members at the time of registration. Solo entries or incomplete teams are not permitted.

faq.question: Is there a registration fee?
faq.answer: Yes. Registration fees are ₹399 per participant for IEEE members and ₹499 per participant for non-IEEE members.

faq.question: Can I form or modify a team after registration?
faq.answer: No. Teams must be complete and finalized during registration. All member details must be submitted at that time.

faq.question: What resources and tools are permitted during the hackathon?
faq.answer: Participants can use any programming languages, frameworks, libraries, or APIs that comply with the hackathon rules.

faq.question: Are mentors available during the hackathon?
faq.answer: Yes. Experienced mentors will be available throughout the event to provide guidance, feedback, and technical support.

faq.question: What kind of support is available during the hackathon?
faq.answer: Participants will have access to high-speed, reliable Wi-Fi and on-site technical support to ensure smooth development, troubleshooting, and uninterrupted collaboration throughout the event.

faq.question: Will there be breaks and refreshments during the hackathon?
faq.answer: Yes. Participants will have scheduled breaks and interactive fun sessions to relax and recharge. Meals and snacks will be provided throughout the event to keep teams energized.
